title: CASE statement produces GDK error on multithreaded database: BATproject does not match always
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test2 (x INT, y BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE);
SELECT CASE WHEN x < 1 THEN 'Negative or Zero' ELSE 'Positive' END AS status FROM test2;
key_bug_features: CASE statement in multithreaded database queries
